audit_status.source_base: Greek Revelation text tradition with Exodus/plague/trumpet imagery; draft aligned later
audit_status.review_note: Compact complete draft reviewed for seventh seal silence, incense prayers, first four trumpets, eagle warning.

verses.restored: When he opened the seventh seal, silence happened in heaven about half an hour.
And I saw the seven messengers who stand before the Divine, and seven trumpets were given to them.
Another messenger came and stood at altar, having golden censer; much incense was given to him, so he might give it with prayers of all holy ones upon golden altar before throne.
The smoke of incense with prayers of holy ones went up before the Divine from hand of messenger.
The messenger took the censer, filled it from fire of altar, and cast it to earth; and thunders, voices, flashes, and shaking happened.
And the seven messengers having seven trumpets prepared themselves to trumpet.
The first trumpeted, and hail and fire mixed with blood/life came, cast to earth; a third of earth and trees were burned, and all green grass burned.
The second trumpeted, and something like great mountain burning with fire was cast into sea; a third of sea became blood/life.
A third of creatures in sea having life died, and a third of ships were destroyed.
The third trumpeted, and a great star fell from heaven, burning like torch, upon a third of rivers and springs of waters.
Name of star is called Wormwood; a third of waters became wormwood, and many humans died from waters because they were made bitter.
The fourth trumpeted, and a third of sun, moon, and stars were struck, so a third of them darkened, and day did not shine for a third of it, and night likewise.
And I saw and heard one eagle flying in mid-heaven, saying with great voice: Woe, woe, woe to those dwelling on earth, from remaining trumpet voices of three messengers about to trumpet.

translation_notes: Trumpets echo Exodus plague imagery and should be read as symbolic warning/exposure, not literal prediction charts.
Prayers of holy ones precede trumpet judgments; worship and witness remain central.
safety_note: Do not use trumpet images for date-setting or fearmongering. They are apocalyptic signs of creation and empire under judgment.
